channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - techraptor.net
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for techraptor.net

item.title: 12 Sided Studios' Newest Project, Force of Extinction, Wipes Out Funding Goals
item.content:encoded:
12 Sided Studios has launched a new crowdfunding campaign for Force of Extinction. The newest project by the tabletop production company is a post-apocalyptic TTRPG where players will struggle to survive in a world of growing evolution.

The Force of Extinction Backerkit Campaign

According to its Backerkit campaign, Force of Extinction is set on Earth after a catastrophic ecological disaster. Humanity is on the brink of extinction, but nature has retaken the world, filling it with vicious plant life, evolved predators, and colossal monsters. The players are Survivors who are tasked with navigating the ruined remains of civilization for supplies while avoiding plants, beasts, and the hostile climate.

The gameplay of Force of Extinction encourages big choices and bigger swings against insurmountable odds. The core rules are quick to learn, built for roleplaying and epic moments using a d20 dice pool system with rolling-under mechanics. Players can create their Survivor from a list of eight Archetypes and building their own settlements. GMs can make their own terrifying predator with the game's Build-A-Beast Workshop rules.

For those familiar with 12 Sided Studios' work in the Actual Play space, the rules of Force of Extinction might seem familiar.  A version of these rules have been featured on the studio's actual play podcast series. Now, those rules are available in both print and digital for backers of this campaign alongside stretch goals like GM screens, custom dice bags, and a monster deck.

The pledge tiers for Force of Extinction are as follows:

  • Digital for $30: PDFs of the Core Rulebook, Quickstart Rules, and all unlocked digital stretch goals
  • Handbook for $55: Physical and digital copies of the Core Rulebook, Quickstart Rules, and all unlocked stretch goals
  • Special Edition for $85: A Special Edition Physical copy of the Core Rulebook, PDFs of the Core Rulebook and Quickstart Rules, and all unlocked stretch goals
  • Survivor Bundle for $150: Everything in the Special Edition tier, a Special Edition GM Screen, a set of custom dice in your color of choice
  • Ultimate Survivor Bundle for $300: Everything in the Survivor Bundle tier, a monster deck, five sets of dice, and a Force of Extinction-themed tactical backpack
  • Online Play Bundle for $1850: Everything in the Ultimate Survivor Bundle and playing in an online session of the game run by your choice of professional DMs Jasper William Cartwright, Edward Spence, or Connie Chang
  • Holiday Escape for $3850: Everything in the Ultimate Survivor Bundle tier and an overnight UK holiday trip, food and lodging included, to Augill Castle from October 24-25 where you'll play an extended campaign GM'd by Jasper and Edward

At the time of writing, the campaign for Force of Extinction has raised $19,004, overtaking its initial funding goal of $10,000. The campaign ends on July 16.

Ever since he was small, Tyler Chancey has had a deep, abiding love for video games and a tendency to think and overanalyze everything he enjoyed. This… More about Tyler
